topic: The Tang Dynasty — golden age of Chinese civilization
music: cinematic guzheng and erhu, majestic and warm, slowly building

beats.narration: In the seventh century, Tang China built Chang'an — the largest, richest city on Earth. The whole world came to its gates.

shots.scene: a Tang emperor on a golden throne in dragon robes with court ladies, tall palace halls and pagodas of Chang'an behind, cut-out ink-wash mountains and drifting clouds
shots.motion: slow commanding push-in toward the enthroned emperor; paper clouds drift; halftone dots pulse on the beat
shots.keyframe_prompt: Mixed-media hand-cut PAPER COLLAGE, editorial motion-graphic zine style. Clearly layered paper cut-outs with visible torn and scissor-cut edges, tape corners and soft real paper drop shadows, on a bold flat imperial deep-red paper background. Halftone print dots, newspaper-clipping scraps, paper-stencil shapes, aged paper texture, slight print misregistration. Scattered geometric collage accents (a small blue paper triangle, a red circle, a zigzag, halftone strips, bits of washi tape). Figures are PRINTED-texture cut-outs of real imagery (sepia old photographs / Chinese woodblock-print / mural), NOT CGI, NOT a 3D render — keep print grain and paper imperfections. High-contrast, punchy, tactile, hand-assembled. SCENE (as layered paper cut-outs): a Tang emperor on a golden throne in dragon robes with court ladies, tall palace halls and pagodas of Chang'an behind, cut-out ink-wash mountains and drifting clouds. Include a title cartouche with large red Chinese characters '盛唐' and a small clean English subtitle 'TANG GOLDEN AGE', plus a single red seal stamp. Keep the headline crisp and legible. Aspect ratio 16:9.

shots.scene: a close cut-in of foreign envoys from many nations bowing before the Tang throne, silk banners and gift boxes, sepia old-photograph cut-out figures
shots.motion: one slow steady push-in on the bowing envoys; torn-paper edges and washi tape flutter lightly

No big headline banner in this shot (keep only a small red seal); it is a cut-in detail of the same scene. Aspect ratio 16:9.

beats.narration: Along the Silk Road, caravans carried silk and paper west, and returned with gold, new faiths, and ideas — Tang China, open to the world.

shots.scene: a long Bactrian camel caravan crossing layered paper desert dunes, cut-out ink-wash mountains, an oasis town scrap on the horizon
shots.motion: dynamic lateral parallax pan following the caravan; layered paper dunes and mountains slide at different depths; clouds drift

shots.motion: one slow push-in on the merchants' exchanging hands; a yellow zigzag scrap flutters lightly

beats.narration: It was the golden age of poetry — Li Bai and Du Fu, still sung today. For three centuries, the Tang burned brightest.

shots.scene: Tang poets gathered by a river raising wine cups under a large cut-out full moon, plum-blossom branches and hanging red lanterns
shots.motion: gentle rise revealing the poets and the full moon; paper lanterns sway; plum petals drift across layers

shots.motion: slow push toward the raised cup and the moon; a paper crane glides across; petals fall on the beat
